text: Research and development investment intensity cannot be assessed from the available evidence, as R&D expenses are reported as N/A across all quarterly income statements provided. This data limitation prevents analysis of the company's technology and innovation spending relative to revenue, which is relevant given the competitive dynamics in the global payments industry.
